content.text:
```mdl
@ Contract – OISAIR Project – Two‑Way Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_3_nda_15

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
type Party = {
    name: string,
    address: string,
    representatives: List<string>
}

type ConfidentialInfo = {
    field: string,          # e.g. “technical data”, “business plan”
    description: string
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – public model objects (stable domain concepts)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Parties
entity disclosing_party: Party
entity receiving_party: Party

@ Clause 1 – Core agreement data
entity agreement: {
    effective_date: string,
    termination_date: string,
    permitted_purpose: string,
    confidential_info: List<ConfidentialInfo>,

    # Boolean flags that capture the normative obligations
    confidentiality_obligation: bool,          # O – keep information secret
    non_use_obligation: bool,                 # O – use only for permitted purpose
    secrecy_obligation: bool,                 # O – do not disclose existence of agreement
    confidential_info_returned: bool,         # O – return/destroy at end of term
    receiving_party_has_rights: bool,          # F – no rights granted to receiving party

    # Numeric / enumerated parameters
    duration_years: int,                       # 5 years after Effective Date
    termination_notice_days: int,              # 30‑day written notice
    surviving_obligation_years: int,           # 3 years of confidentiality after termination
    governing_law: string,                     # “Republic of Italy”
    jurisdiction: string                       # “ordinary Courts of Trieste”
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Functions – reusable predicates (optional, kept simple)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
func is_positive_int(v: int) -> bool: v > 0

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – deontic requirements (modality, name, LTLf body)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 3 – Obligation to keep information secret
rule O confidentiality_obligation:
    agreement.confidentiality_obligation always

@ Clause 3 – Obligation to use information only for the permitted purpose
rule O non_use_obligation:
    agreement.non_use_obligation always

@ Clause 6 – No rights granted to the Receiving Party (hypothesis)
rule F granting_rights:
    agreement.receiving_party_has_rights always

@ Clause 5 – Return / destruction of Confidential Information at termination
rule O return_or_destroy:
    agreement.confidential_info_returned always

@ Clause 10 – Duration of the Agreement (5 years)
rule O agreement_duration:
    agreement.duration_years = 5 always

@ Clause 10 – Termination notice period (30 days)
rule O termination_notice:
    agreement.termination_notice_days = 30 always

@ Clause 10 – Survival of confidentiality obligations (3 years)
rule O surviving_obligation:
    agreement.surviving_obligation_years = 3 always

@ Clause 12 – Governing law (Republic of Italy)
rule O governing_law:
    agreement.governing_law = "Republic of Italy" always

@ Clause 12 – Jurisdiction (ordinary Courts of Trieste)
rule O jurisdiction:
    agreement.jurisdiction = "ordinary Courts of Trieste" always

@ Clause 16 – Secrecy of the Agreement itself
rule O secrecy_obligation:
    agreement.secrecy_obligation always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Optional sanity checks (facts) – removed for final model
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# fact is_positive_int(agreement.duration_years)
# fact is_positive_int(agreement.termination_notice_days)
# fact is_positive_int(agreement.surviving_obligation_years)
```
